title: lobelia dasyphylla
intro: Lobelia dasyphylla, also known as the hairy blue lobelia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae, commonly found in Australia and New Zealand. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly lobeline, which has been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Lobelia dasyphylla include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to aid in weight loss and improve cognitive function. Herbal preparations of Lobelia dasyphylla can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and capsules, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using this plant for medicinal purposes.
